code: import{useState,useCallback}from'react';import{FractalMethod}from'../shared/types';import{generateFractal}from'../services/api';const CARD_WIDTH=750;const CARD_HEIGHT=1050;export const useFractalGeneration=function(){let initialMethod=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:FractalMethod.Mandelbrot;const[imageSrc,setImageSrc]=useState(undefined);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState(undefined);const generate=useCallback(async method=>{setLoading(true);setError(undefined);const config={method,width:CARD_WIDTH,height:CARD_HEIGHT,seed:Math.floor(Math.random()*1000000)};try{const response=await generateFractal(config);if(response.success&&response.imageBase64){setImageSrc(response.imageBase64);}else{setError(response.error||'Failed to generate image');}}catch(err){setError('An unexpected error occurred.');}finally{setLoading(false);}},[]);const surpriseMe=useCallback(()=>{const methods=Object.values(FractalMethod);const randomMethod=methods[Math.floor(Math.random()*methods.length)];generate(randomMethod);},[generate]);return{imageSrc,loading,error,generate,surpriseMe};};
